---
title: "Compassionate Pathways"
draft: true
---

::: {.hero}

::: {.hero-badge}
CP
:::

# Compassionate counselling for healing, clarity, and change

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Integer euismod, sapien nec varius faucibus, nibh dui convallis augue, non mattis justo velit at justo.

::: {.button-row}
[Book an Intro Call](/contact.html){.btn-cp-primary}
[Learn More](/about.html){.btn-cp-secondary}
:::

:::

## Welcome

::: {.section-intro}
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam.
:::

## Services

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.card-soft}
### Individual Counselling
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit.
:::

::: {.card-soft}
### Relationship Support
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident.
:::

::: {.card-soft}
### Trauma-Informed Practice
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit anim.
:::

:::

::: {.band}

## How to Get Started

::: {.steps}

::: {.step}
::: {.step-number}
1
:::

**Make contact**

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
:::

::: {.step}
::: {.step-number}
2
:::

**Arrange a first session**

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
:::

::: {.step}
::: {.step-number}
3
:::

**Begin gently**

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.
:::

:::

:::

## Meet Kris

::: {.split-two}

::: {}
<div class="profile-photo">
  <img src="/images/kris-lavenia.jpg" alt="Portrait of Kris LaVenia">
  <div class="profile-label">Kris LaVenia</div>
</div>
:::

::: {.panel-soft}
### A calm and relational approach

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

[Read more about Kris](/about.html){.btn-cp-primary}
:::

:::

::: {.cta-band}
## Ready when you are

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Curabitur vel erat at nisl fringilla gravida.

[Contact Kris](/contact.html){.btn-cp-primary}
[Explore Services](/services.html){.btn-cp-secondary}
:::
